description: Convert the polygon vector layer at /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson into a raster GeoTIFF using the Rasterize (Vector to Raster) tool. Use the 'area_sqkm' field for the burn-in value and set the output resolution to 0.005 georeferenced units (degrees) for both horizontal and vertical. Ensure the output extent matches the input layer extent and set the nodata value to -9999. Save the GeoTIFF to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/polygon_raster.tif and the QGIS project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/rasterize_project.qgs.
